channel.title: ide on SoundsBrown
channel.description: Recent content in ide on SoundsBrown
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: Burning bootloaders
item.description: In Pololu config utility: Enable VCC output Set regulator mode to 5V Insert cable the right way around: In Arduino IDE: Board: Arduino Uno Programmer: Atmel STK500 Always use “Upload using programmer” Use first of two COM ports (e.g. COM9 if it advertises 9 and 10) Burning bootloader also just works

item.title: Arduino IDE
item.description: Installing a dark theme Clone or download https://github.com/jeffThompson/DarkArduinoTheme Backup C:\Program Files (x86)\Arduino\lib\theme Overwrite with the theme directory from DarkArduinoTheme

item.title: PlatformIO and VS Code
item.description: Installation https://docs.platformio.org/en/latest/core/installation.html#installation-methods Setup To create a new project, go to the destination directory and run: pio init -b nanoatmega328 --ide vscode This will create the necessary files, including a platformio.ini which will look like this: [env:nanoatmega328] platform = atmelavr board = nanoatmega328 framework = arduino lib_deps = Wire, SPI, olikraus/U8g2@^2.28.8, Adafruit MCP4725 See https://docs.platformio.org/en/latest/boards/index.html for a list of supported targets. Libraries The lib_deps field is not created by default and needs to be maintained manually.
